name: Greek Zucchini Balls (Kolokithokeftedes)
method: Add the grated zucchini, spices, mint, onion, garlic, and egg into the
Mix all the ingredients well and form round ball structures.
Fry the zucchini balls in olive oil until they turn golden brown.
Serve the zucchini balls with Greek yoghurt on the side.
Your dish is ready to be served.
